quality_assessment.completeness: Excellent. All standard spell fields are present and populated.
quality_assessment.clarity: High. The description clearly outlines the setup time, consumption time, number of participants, and the extensive list of benefits.
quality_assessment.balance_consideration: Very high-level spell (6th) with powerful, broad, and long-lasting benefits (immunity, advantage on WIS saves, temporary HP max increase). The 1,000 gp material component cost is appropriate for the effect.

mechanics_review.casting_time: 10 minutes (Long setup for a party buff)
mechanics_review.components: V, S, M (Consumable 1,000 gp gem-encrusted bowl - high initial cost)
mechanics_review.duration: Instantaneous (This refers to the casting/setup phase; the benefits last 24 hours, which is clearly stated in the description.)
effects_breakdown: Advantage on all Wisdom saving throws.
Increases maximum HP by 2d10 and restores that many HP.
Affects up to 12 creatures besides the caster.
mechanics_review.potential_issues: None detected. The mechanics are robust for a high-tier support spell. The description clearly separates the 1-hour consumption time from the 24-hour duration of effects.
